title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform for Shopify e-commerce brands, founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The platform combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews into a bundled suite to increase customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Merchants can build loyalty programs featuring points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* It automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* The software syncs verified reviews with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can create custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* The platform integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.  
* Businesses can create custom referral networks and membership tiers with perks like early access to products, free shipping, or special discounts.  
* Built-in email marketing flows include welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without requiring custom development work.
